title: Premium Access
seoTitle: Game of Darts Premium Access | BarkinMad Studios
description: Document Game of Darts premium access, Pro, DartBot unlock, 48-hour access, ads, and the current BarkinMad Coins verification status.
summary: Game of Darts currently documents premium access through Pro, DartBot-only unlock, 48-hour access, ads, and match continuation rather than a verified BarkinMad Coins model.
heroImageAlt: Placeholder artwork for pending Game of Darts premium access image
sourceNotes: This page uses the required Website Framework v1.1 core slug `barkinmad-coins`, but Game of Darts-specific BarkinMad Coins usage is not verified.
Premium details are based on Ads-And-IAP.md, AppSettings, IAPManager, and MatchLimitManager documentation.

sections.heading: Premium model
paragraphs: The current documented premium access model includes Pro version, DartBot AI, and a 48-hour unlock.
Observed premium gates include Pro removing banner ads, Pro or 48-hour access unlocking several game options, and DartBot access being available through Pro, DartBot-only unlock, or 48-hour access.

sections.heading: BarkinMad Coins status
paragraphs: No verified Game of Darts BarkinMad Coins gameplay or wallet usage was found in the central Game of Darts documentation used for this rollout.
This page exists because Website Framework v1.1 requires the core slug. A future v1.2 framework update should allow non-ZX apps to replace irrelevant core slugs cleanly.

images.alt: Placeholder artwork for Game of Darts premium access
images.caption: Premium access artwork pending
